results.definition_en: A hard shining stuff like iron or gold, taken from rocks.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 金屬；自岩石提煉、堅硬有光澤的物質。
results.example_en: The chair is made of metal.

results.definition_en: The part of a thing that is the same way from each side.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 中間、中央；各方等距之處。
results.example_en: He stood in the middle of the room.

results.definition_en: The white liquid that comes from a cow or other animal, used as a drink.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 牛奶、奶；自牛或其他動物所產之白色液體飲品。
results.example_en: Drink your milk before you go.

results.definition_en: The part of a person that thinks and feels.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 心智、頭腦;負責思考與感受的內在部分。
results.example_en: Keep her words in your mind.

results.definition_en: A deep hole in the earth from which metal or coal is taken.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 礦坑、礦山；自地下開採金屬或煤之處。
results.example_en: The men work in a coal mine.

results.definition_en: A short time, made of sixty seconds.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 分鐘；六十秒鐘的時間。
results.example_en: Wait one minute, please.

results.definition_en: Very small drops of water in the air that make it hard to see far.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 薄霧；空氣中極小水滴造成的視線模糊。
results.example_en: There was thick mist on the road this morning.

results.definition_en: What people use to pay for things they get.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 金錢、錢；用以購買物品的工具。
results.example_en: I have no money on me today.

results.definition_en: One of the twelve parts of a year, like April or May.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 月份；一年中的十二個區塊之一。
results.example_en: The wedding is next month.

results.definition_en: The early part of the day, from sunrise to noon.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 早晨、上午；日出至中午的時段。
results.example_en: I go for a walk every morning.

results.definition_en: A female parent.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 母親；女性親長。
results.example_en: My mother is in the garden.

results.definition_en: The act of moving, or the way a thing moves.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 動作、運動；移動的現象或方式。
results.example_en: The boat was in slow motion on the water.

results.definition_en: A very high part of the earth, much higher than a hill.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 山、高山；地表上遠高於丘陵的隆起。
results.example_en: She climbed a high mountain last year.

results.definition_en: An act of going from one place to another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 移動、搬動；從一處到另一處。
results.example_en: Make one move to the left, please.

results.definition_en: Sounds put together in a way that is pleasing to the ear.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 音樂；悅耳的聲響組合。
results.example_en: She plays good music on the piano.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在鋼琴上彈奏動聽的音樂。

results.definition_en: The word by which a person or thing is called.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 名字、名稱；用以稱呼人或事物之詞。
results.example_en: What is your name?

results.definition_en: A country and its people.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 國家、民族；一個國家及其人民。
results.example_en: Our nation is at peace.

results.definition_en: A thing one must have.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 需要、需求；必須具備之物。
results.example_en: We have a need for more food.

results.definition_en: Word of new things that have happened.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 新聞、消息；近期發生之事的訊息。
results.example_en: I heard good news today.

results.definition_en: The time when the sky is dark, between evening and morning.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 夜晚、夜間；天黑至天亮之間的時段。
results.example_en: We go to bed at night.

results.definition_en: A loud or harsh sound.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 噪音、聲響；響亮或刺耳的聲音。
results.example_en: The dogs made a lot of noise.

results.definition_en: A short message written down; or a single sound in music.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 便條、筆記；或音樂中的一個音符。
results.example_en: She left a note on the table.

results.definition_en: A word or sign that tells how many.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 數字、號碼；表示數量的詞或符號。
results.example_en: Write your number on the paper.

results.definition_en: The act of watching a thing closely.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 觀察、觀測；仔細注視某事物。
results.example_en: His observation of birds is very careful.

results.definition_en: An act of saying one will give a thing if it is wanted.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 提議、提供；表示願意給予的意思表達。
results.example_en: She made an offer of help.
